summary: Made a surgical opening adjustment to improve the handoff from Chapter 9 and avoid repeating the same place-first opening scaffold used by the adjacent chapter, while preserving the chapter's beats, tone, and exit into Chapter 11.
edits: Reframed the opening around Halima's immediate action on the cot instead of starting with a static room tableau.
Kept the same lodge-room sensory details and bus-stand pressure while folding them into the action-led entry.
Trimmed the repeated overnight setup so Aminul's room across the corridor reads as continuation rather than reset.
